parameters.query:
SELECT client_id, client_name, scopes, active
FROM oauth_clients 
WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Process Token Request').item.json.client_id }}'
  AND client_secret = '{{ $('Process Token Request').item.json.client_secret }}'
  AND active = true
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO oauth_tokens (access_token, client_id, scopes, expires_at, active)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Generate JWT Token').item.json.access_token }}',
  '{{ $('Generate JWT Token').item.json.client_id }}',
  ARRAY[{{ $('Generate JWT Token').item.json.db_scopes.map(s => `'${s}'`).join(',') }}],
  '{{ $('Generate JWT Token').item.json.expires_at }}',
  true
)
RETURNING token_id, created_at;
